Function reference

Run Shiny App

Function for activating the {ordinalsimr} Shiny application

run_app()
Run the Shiny Application

Simulation Functions

Functions useful for running your own simulations

run_simulations()
Run Simulations
calculate_power_t2error()
Calculate Hypothesis Test Parameters
calculate_t1_error()
Calculate Type 1 Error
format_simulation_data()
Format Simulation Data

Helper Functions

Constructors and utility functions

ordinal_tests()
Ordinal outcome tests
plot_distribution_results()
Plot Distribution
assign_groups()
Randomly assign groups
parse_ratio_text()
Parse Ratio Text

Data

Example data frames/lists

simulation_data_one_group
Simulation Data for One Group
simulation_data_one_group_formatted
Formatted Simulation Data for One Group
simulation_data_two_groups
Simulation Data for Two Groups
simulation_data_two_groups_formatted
Formatted Simulation Data for Two Groups
